headline: Waste Management (WM) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know

headline: Waste Connections Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Waste Connections (NYSE:WCN) opened fiscal 2026 with first-quarter results that management said exceeded internal expectations, driven by stronger-than-anticipated pricing retention, improving special waste activity, and continued operating leverage from labor and technology initiatives. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Waste Management (WM) After Its Recent Share Price Strength?
summary: If you are wondering whether Waste Management at around US$232.80 is still a fair deal or starting to look stretched, focusing on what the current price implies about future cash flows is a useful place to start. The stock has returned 3.9% over the last week, 3.5% over the past month, 6.6% year to date and 3.9% over the last year, with longer term returns of 50.8% over three years and 83.5% over five years that can influence how much optimism is already built into the price.
